question: Which competitor holds the largest market share in the last quarter shown?

options.A: Cannot determine which competitor holds the largest market share without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.B: The orange area (Company B) indicates the highest market share.
options.C: The green area (Company C) represents the dominant share.
options.D: The purple area (Company A) is clearly the market leader.

explanation: The chart shows different colored areas but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category holds the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
